_comment: When router cannot pick a table confidently, emit CLARIFY with one of these chip sets. Adds 3 new dimensions beyond the existing brand-vs-company clarify already documented in schema_context.md.

trigger: Question names a metric (top, best, average, share, total) on brand/company/category WITHOUT 'my', 'mine', 'our', 'market', 'competitor', 'rival', 'other'.
Example: 'top brands', 'average price by category', 'best categories'.
dimensions.clarify_text: Are you asking about your own data or the broader market?

trigger: User names a specific product/SKU without scope qualifier.
Example: 'Show me Berry Fizz', 'How is Animal Face doing?'
dimensions.clarify_text: Do you mean your own product or a competitor product in the market?

trigger: Could mean: wholesale revenue (rhize_orders.subtotal) OR inferred market sell-through (chatbot_mv_market_daily.revenue) OR tenant's scraped revenue (rhize_dataset_main.Revenue).
User says 'how much quantity' / 'how many units' without scope.
Could mean: on-hand (rhize_live_inventory.current_qty) OR scraped listed total (rhize_dataset_main.`Today's_Quantity_Total`) OR market quantity (chatbot_mv_market_daily.quantity).
